case_title: BAYSIDE VILLAGE ASSOCIATES, A PARTNERSHIP vs. BREWER, FRANK T. et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAYSIDE VILLAGE ASSOCIATES, A PARTNERSHIP AS TO DEFENDANT BREWER, FRANK T.
PROOF OF SERVICE OF NOTICE TO PAY OR QUIT AND/OR NOTICE TO VACATE FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAYSIDE VILLAGE ASSOCIATES, A PARTNERSHIP

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT SERVED JAN-29-1997, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BREWER, FRANK T.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BREWER, FRANK T. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: FOUR BAYSIDE VILLAGE PLACE #112, LEASE FORFEITED, NOTATION DONE ON ORIGINAL INSTRUMENT PER C.R.C. 522
